name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG Detail Zip Wallet. Gucci small leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with pink GG hardware to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Pink leather trim, embossed fabric lining with GG details, inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.

Color: Pink/Full Leather.
